textByHash.224be7f3cc8df05c64080fcfe0458d6d095f89f8: With 500 laps finished, you'll get a maniacal monkey.
textByHash.27f20526756ed0eec77960f15d2a6a651838ae55: Looks like you haven't completed any laps, but I'll be sure to keep track of them, when you do.
textByHash.29ad231fbb452e74aceda72285e2d4e65e58a187: At 1000 laps, you'll be able transform him into a spooky skeleton monkey,
textByHash.2a1504c1b7cd2246cb58c029e9e52ccd24a162f1: So far you've completed laps, don't stop now!
textByHash.3aed0101b3ead3a06d0b2ee28f00ee035ab6a49e: Ahem, here we are, At 100 you'll unlock a Karamjan Monkey transformation.
textByHash.3d3f6669eaf95061ebfcffcb4de3f76cf07f574c: 1500 laps for a little Kruk Jr monkey,
textByHash.4fc4310efbed147c9db5e5e45cce3ce99e259848: This is our agility course, we use it to stay nimble and to keep our wits sharp. My name is Bobawu and I look after the course.
textByHash.59be4823087e6b2eacc5fdf4f9498f822f66047d: Finally at 2000 laps, he can transform to look like our King Awowogei.
textByHash.76bda72c64b96d87a8645957b02da2062a861799: Sure thing my friend, so far you've completed laps, don't stop now!
textByHash.84762f56e9d80ed2e0d709143c035c8f159bfc3b: After completing 250 laps, you'll unlock a scary zombie monkey.
textByHash.9924443735718536aa04bbad636427f4d75bf27f: As a friend and fellow monkey, you're free to use it anytime, but you'll need to be as nimble as a ninja first!
textByHash.bd1ce74ea8b597e7770a161731261c6bccde0dcf: I'm good thank you, how can I help you today?
textByHash.c5977aa42b0f732da752944f7a9b6b984d586302: Sure thing my friend, so far you've completed 1 lap, don't stop now!
textByHash.d56fbf1ebf1ba03506f37ff1e17d0766ebe47bda: I see you have your own monkey friend, by completing laps here you can transform him into different monkeys!
textByHash.e026fb611ed15919decafc660ca53343071899bf: So far you've completed 1 lap, don't stop now!
textByHash.e739df169a892deba4a332c4c11c8f95c41be8eb: I can't offer you anything for now, so I don't see much reason to count your laps either.
textByHash.fae46e395c6182aae3ec7836e133d92312990937: That's okay my friend, come back anytime.
